title: cenchrus mitis
intro: Cenchrus mitis, also known as the Indian sandbur or Indian foxtail grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cenchrus mitis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
